recipe.title: High-Protein Ground Beef Sweet Potato Bowl
recipe.summary: A sweet and savory bowl with seasoned lean ground beef, air-fried sweet potato, creamy cottage cheese, avocado, and a tangy sprinkle of Tajín.
ingredients: 1/2 cup peeled sweet potato, cut into uneven bite-size cubes
1 tablespoon avocado, diced into irregular pieces
Salt and black pepper, to taste
instructions: Preheat the air fryer to 390 degrees Fahrenheit.
Toss the sweet potato cubes with the olive oil, salt, and black pepper.
Air-fry the sweet potato for 10 to 14 minutes, shaking the basket halfway through, until browned outside and tender inside.
Meanwhile, cook the ground beef in a nonstick skillet over medium heat, breaking it into naturally uneven crumbles.
When the beef is mostly browned, season it with Kinder's steak seasoning.
Add 1 to 2 tablespoons of water and stir until the seasoning coats the beef and the water cooks down.
Add the ground beef and roasted sweet potato to a bowl.
Spoon the cottage cheese loosely beside the beef and sweet potato rather than shaping it into a perfect scoop.
Top with the irregularly diced avocado and a light sprinkle of Tajín.
tips: Adding the water after the beef begins browning keeps very lean beef moist without preventing browning.
Cut the sweet potato into slightly uneven pieces for natural texture, but keep them similar enough to cook evenly.
Measure the olive oil because even a small amount changes the calorie total.
Nutrition is approximate and may vary by beef, cottage cheese, avocado, and seasoning brands.

seo.meta_title: Ground Beef Sweet Potato Bowl | 41g Protein
seo.meta_description: Make this ground beef sweet potato bowl with cottage cheese, avocado, and Tajín for approximately 41g protein and 390 calories.

images.image_prompt: A realistic restaurant-style bowl with naturally crumbled seasoned ground beef, irregularly cut roasted sweet potato, cottage cheese spooned loosely to one side, a few irregular avocado pieces, and a light dusting of Tajín. Natural ingredient overlap, restrained colors, and believable imperfections. No perfect scoops, symmetrical sections, identical cubes, extra garnish, rice, lettuce, tomatoes, onions, cheese, or unlisted ingredients.
images.alt_text: High-protein ground beef and roasted sweet potato bowl with cottage cheese, avocado, and Tajín.
